things.name: Ibiza Old Town (Dalt Vila)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage fortified old city with cathedral, castle and spectacular views

things.name: Es Vedra
things.description: Mysterious 400-metre sea stack rising from the sea, one of Ibiza's most magical sights

things.name: Platja d'en Bossa
things.description: Ibiza's longest beach stretching 3km with beach clubs and the world-famous club scene

things.name: Cala d'Hort
things.description: Stunning unspoilt cove with direct views of Es Vedra and Es Vedranell

things.name: Ses Salines Natural Park
things.description: Ancient salt flats and nature reserve with flamingos and crystal-clear coves

things.name: Santa Eulalia
things.description: Relaxed resort town with hilltop church, market and family-friendly beaches

things.name: Formentera Day Trip
things.description: Neighbouring island with Caribbean-style turquoise water and white sand beaches

things.name: Hippy Markets
things.description: Iconic Las Dalias and Punta Arabi hippie markets with crafts and bohemian atmosphere

things.name: Sunset Strip San Antonio
things.description: Famous waterfront bars at Café del Mar for Ibiza's legendary sunset experience

things.name: Ibiza Cathedral
things.description: 14th-century Gothic cathedral within the fortified walls of Dalt Vila
